details: Synacktiv team participates in the automotive category targeting Tesla vehicles.
Synacktiv successfully demonstrates a chain of exploits starting from the Bluetooth baseband, achieving root access to the infotainment system.
The vulnerabilities are responsibly disclosed to Tesla via the Zero Day Initiative (ZDI). Synacktiv is awarded $250,000 and a Tier 2 prize.
Tesla releases a software update via OTA to address the heap overflow and out-of-bounds write vulnerabilities in the Bluetooth stack.
